positive: A stylized, whimsical geometric woodland scene featuring friendly, abstracted forest animals (fox, rabbit, owl, deer) rendered in clean, contrasting silhouettes. The composition should be centralized and circular, suitable for a T-shirt print. Use a limited, harmonious color palette of muted sage green, terracotta orange, navy blue, and cream. The background should have subtle, abstract watercolor wash textures. Style: Flat design illustration meets modern Nordic folk art. Lighting: Bright, even, directional daylight emphasizing clean edges and strong contrast. Print-friendly details: Vector quality, high contrast, scalable pattern elements.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, messy, complex background, noisy, bad anatomy, low quality, grainy, out of frame, excessive detail, photorealism
